projects.title: Poke Data Pro
projects.description: Requesting data from the Poke API and displaying it in a user-friendly interface. The project includes features such as searching for specific Pokémon, filtering by type, and viewing detailed information about each Pokémon.

projects.title: Chincha Chamber Commerce
projects.description: A website for a local business. The project includes features such as a homepage with information about the company, a page for services offered, and a contact page. The website is designed to be visually appealing and easy to navigate.

projects.title: Baby Lucy's Store
projects.description: A simple e-commerce website for baby products. The project includes features such as product listings, a shopping cart, and a checkout process. The website is designed to be responsive and user-friendly.

projects.title: WhiteWater Rafting
projects.description: A website for a whitewater rafting company. The project includes features such as a homepage with information about the company, a page for booking rafting trips, and a gallery of photos from past trips. The website is designed to be visually appealing and easy to navigate.
